header.title: Cuisinous - Marketplace for Home Chefs
header.description: Sell your homemade food or discover local chefs in your area. Our platform connects food lovers with talented home chefs through our web dashboard and mobile apps.

hero.title: Discover homemade food from chefs in your neighborhood
hero.subtitle: Buy delicious homemade meals or sell your culinary creations through our easy-to-use platform.

features.title: The Cuisinous Experience
features.subtitle: Whether you're a home chef or food enthusiast, we've built tools to make the experience delightful

location.title: Location-Based Discovery
location.description: Find and order from chefs near you, with real-time availability and delivery options.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform Access
crossPlatform.description: Manage your food business on web or through our iOS and Android apps.

safety.title: Safe Transactions
safety.description: Secure payments and verified chef profiles for peace of mind.

sellers.title: For Home Chefs
sellers.subtitle: Turn your passion for cooking into income. Our platform gives you everything you need to start selling your homemade food.
features: Easy-to-use dashboard to manage your menu and orders
Set your own schedule and delivery options
Get paid securely with automatic deposits
Build your reputation with customer reviews

buyers.title: For Food Lovers
buyers.subtitle: Discover authentic homemade food from talented chefs in your community.
features: Browse by cuisine, dietary needs, or location
Read reviews and see chef ratings
Save favorites and get personalized recommendations

testimonials.title: What Our Community Says
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from chefs and customers using Cuisinous

quotes.text: I've doubled my income selling my Jamaican dishes while keeping my full-time job. The dashboard makes managing orders so simple.
quotes.author: Marcus, Home Chef

quotes.text: As a busy mom, I love being able to order authentic homemade meals from talented cooks in my area. It's changed our dinner routine!
quotes.author: Sarah, Customer

quotes.text: The customer feedback has helped me improve my recipes and presentation. I've built a real following through Cuisinous.
quotes.author: Elena, Home Chef

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Service
terms.metaDescription: Read the terms and conditions governing your use of Cuisinous marketplace platform

introduction.title: INTRODUCTION
introduction.content: Welcome to Cuisinous. These Terms and Conditions govern your access and use of our website, mobile application, and related services. By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

definitions.title: DEFINITIONS
definitions.user: refers to any individual accessing or using the Services, including Customers and Vendors.
definitions.customer: refers to any User ordering meals via the Platform.
definitions.vendor: refers to any individual or entity offering and selling meals through the Platform.
definitions.order: refers to any request made by a Customer for a meal offered by a Vendor.
definitions.platformOwner: refers to the entity operating and maintaining the Platform.

scope.title: SCOPE OF SERVICES
scope.content: The Platform serves as a marketplace connecting Customers with Vendors who offer homemade meals. Vendors are solely responsible for the preparation, quality, and safety of their meals. The Platform does not own, prepare, store, or distribute any meals.

accounts.title: USER ACCOUNTS
accounts.registration: To use the Services, Users must create an account, providing accurate and complete information.
accounts.security: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials and for all activities under their account.
accounts.eligibility: Users must be at least 18 years old to create an account.

contact.title: CONTACT INFORMATION
contact.content: For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at

terms.acknowledgement: By accessing or using our Services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms and Conditions.
